# Test data

This directory is reserved for small, freely redistributable ProDOS fixtures.

The automated tests currently construct artificial disk blocks in memory. Do not add
copyrighted Apple II disk images to this repository.

`applesoft/` contains synthetic AppleSoft BASIC source files used by tokenizer
and CLI round-trip tests.

Any future external fixture must include its source, licence, and a short note
explaining which behaviour it covers.
